name: 碧荷庄
description: 万家在翠藕岛的庄园，有会客厅、花园、水池。花园水池有秘密排水机关，只有万家嫡系知晓。

visual.prompt: Chinese lakeside manor with lotus pond, Republican era, oil painting style, autumn rain

name: 老宅
description: 翠藕岛上的废弃老宅，万茂林与陶尽恭在此遇害。旱季时水下道路可通达。

visual.prompt: Abandoned Chinese old house on an island, overgrown, oil painting style

name: 青蕖舫
description: 停泊在鄱阳湖边的画舫，蒲怀曾在此做帮厨，夏莲曾在此唱歌。

visual.prompt: Chinese pleasure boat on Poyang Lake, painted boat, oil painting style

name: 码头
description: 翠藕岛码头，连接水路交通。

visual.prompt: Chinese rural pier on a lake, small boats, oil painting style

name: 花园
description: 碧荷庄花园，内有水池。水池有秘密排水机关，暴雨时可将池水排入湖中。纪方原在此遇害。

visual.prompt: Chinese manor garden with ornamental pool, lotus flowers, oil painting style
